name: Outbound IG Lead Bot — 1 · Chat & Capture

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((function() { const p = $('Merge reply').first().json; const subscriber = $('Normalize input').first().json.ig_user_id; const contentType = $('Normalize input').first().json.channel || 'instagram'; const msg = { type: 'text', text: p.reply }; if (p.ask_quick_assistance === true) { msg.buttons = [{type:'reply',caption:'Yes'},{type:'reply',caption:'No'}]; } return { subscriber_id: subscriber, data: { version: 'v2', content: { type: contentType, messages: [msg] } } }; })()) }}
